The greater the number of bullish ratings, the more positive analysts are on the stock and the greater the number of bearish ratings, the more negative analysts are on the stock', 'This current average represents a 4.12% decrease from the previous average price target of $356.50. ', 'Stay up to date on Air Products & Chemicals analyst ratings.', 'Analysts work in banking and financial systems and typically specialize in reporting for stocks or defined sectors.
